mapper.sql: id, title, content, type, status, publish_time, expire_time, read_count, create_user_id, update_user_id, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM system_announcement WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM system_announcement WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM system_announcement WHERE status = #{status,typeHandler=com.inkstage.handler.EnumCodeTypeHandler} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY publish_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_announcement ( title, content, type, status, publish_time, expire_time, read_count, create_user_id, update_user_id, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{type,typeHandler=com.inkstage.handler.EnumCodeTypeHandler}, #{status,typeHandler=com.inkstage.handler.EnumCodeTypeHandler}, #{publishTime}, #{expireTime}, #{readCount}, #{createUserId}, #{updateUserId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE system_announcement
title = #{title}, content = #{content}, type = #{type,typeHandler=com.inkstage.handler.EnumCodeTypeHandler}, status = #{status,typeHandler=com.inkstage.handler.EnumCodeTypeHandler}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, read_count = #{readCount}, update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE system_announcement SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE system_announcement SET read_count = read_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
